facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 2,867 reviews. At a beachfront restaurant in Phu Quoc.

Mai Hương Beachfront sits right on the Grand World seafront, and the numbers don't lie. Nearly 3,000 people rated it almost perfectly. That's not luck. That's consistency.

Add it to your Phu Quoc itinerary before the crowds catch on. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves while your food arrives. Mai Hương Beachfront at Grand World is pulling a 4.9 from 2,867 reviews. The view alone explains half of it. Tag your travel buddy.
